messages.General.Done.Tooltip: Close window, apply and save changes.
messages.MainWindow.Status.InvalidToken:
Pulsoid account not linked!
Link your account in options.
messages.MainWindow.Status.DataError: Error at obtaining heart rate data!
messages.MainWindow.Status.RetryConnection:
Error: Connection to Pulsoid!
Retrying connection... {0}
messages.InfoWindow.Title: PulsoidToOSC info
messages.InfoWindow.AboutText: Simple tool for streaming heart rate from Pulsoid to OSC, with extra support for VRChat.
messages.ColorPickerWindow.Title: PulsoidToOSC color picker
messages.OptionsWindow.Title: PulsoidToOSC options
messages.OptionsWindow.General.Title: General
messages.OptionsWindow.General.GetPulsoidToken.To: Open Pulsoid authorization page in your web browser.
messages.OptionsWindow.General.GetPulsoidToken.Te: Open Pulsoid authorization page in web browser
messages.OptionsWindow.General.SetPulsoidToken.Fi:
Click to show token.

Enter Pulsoid token, then submit it with the button.
messages.OptionsWindow.General.AutoStart.Tooltip:
Automatically start connection to Pulsoid and OSC on application launch, saving you one click.

It will NOT start the application with the system.
messages.OptionsWindow.General.MinimizeToTray.Too: Minimize the application to the system tray.
messages.OptionsWindow.OSC.Title: OSC
messages.OptionsWindow.OSC.SendToManualEndpoint: Send heart rate to manual OSC endpoint
messages.OptionsWindow.OSC.SendToManualEndpoint.T: When enabled, heart rate parameters will be sent to the following OSC configuration.
messages.OptionsWindow.OSC.OSCPort.Tooltip: OSC Port in range of 1 to 65535.
messages.OptionsWindow.VRChat.Title: VRChat
messages.OptionsWindow.VRChat.UseVRCOSCQuery: Use VRC OSC Query auto configuration
messages.OptionsWindow.VRChat.UseVRCOSCQuery.Tool:
When enabled, all data will be sent to VRChat clients running on localhost (the same PC where this app is running) automatically, independent of the OSC settings.

If you want to use this app only for VRChat, you can disable sending data to the manual OSC endpoint.
messages.OptionsWindow.VRChat.SendToAllVRCClients: Send to all VRC Clients on LAN (requires auto config)
If you want to run this app on a different PC than VRChat but on the same LAN, you can enable this.
messages.OptionsWindow.VRChat.SendToVRCChatbox: Send heart rate to VRChat chatbox
messages.OptionsWindow.VRChat.SendToVRCChatbox.To: Messages are sent to all auto-configured VRChat clients and the manually defined OSC endpoint.
messages.OptionsWindow.VRChat.VRCChatboxMessage.T:
<bpm> will be replaced with the heart rate value. If the message doesn't contain <bpm>, the heart rate will be added at the end of the message.

<trend> will be replaced with an arrow indicating trend of how much the heart rate is changing.
messages.OptionsWindow.HeartRate.Title: Heart Rate
messages.OptionsWindow.HeartRate.FloatRange.Min.T: Minimal value of heart rate mapped to float, this will affect all float parameters.
messages.OptionsWindow.HeartRate.FloatRange.Max.T: Maximal value of heart rate mapped to float, this will affect all float parameters.
messages.OptionsWindow.HeartRate.TrendRange.Min.T: Higher value will make trend less sensitive to decreasing heart rate.
messages.OptionsWindow.HeartRate.TrendRange.Max.T: Higher value will make trend less sensitive to increasing heart rate.
messages.OptionsWindow.HeartRate.Offset.Tooltip: This offset will be added to received heart rate value and will affect all parameters.
Undesired heart rate values will be adjusted to the nearest non-special value. This may not work for floats with adjusted range.
messages.OptionsWindow.HeartRate.RandomValue.Tool: When enabled, heart rate will be replaced by a random value in range of 1 - 255.
messages.OptionsWindow.Parameters.Title: Parameters
messages.OptionsWindow.Parameters.DataType.Toolti: Select data type of the parameter.
messages.OptionsWindow.UI.Title: Personalize
messages.OptionsWindow.UI.UseCustomColors.Tooltip: When enabled, custom colors will be used insted of system default.
messages.OptionsWindow.Tools.Title: Tools
messages.OptionsWindow.Tools.HeartRateTesting.Too: Run offline heart rate testing, app will generate oscillating heart rate values without connecting to Pulsoid.
messages.OptionsWindow.Tools.HeartRateTesting.Min: Minimal value of generated heart rate during testing.
messages.OptionsWindow.Tools.HeartRateTesting.Max: Maximal value of generated heart rate during testing.
messages.OptionsWindow.Tools.HeartRateTesting.Ste: How much the heart rate value will be incremented each time.
messages.OptionsWindow.Tools.HeartRateTesting.Int: How often the heart rate value will be incremented.
